Class Market

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Game.Market
All Implemented Interfaces:
MementoManager<MarketMemento>
public class Market extends Object implements MementoManager<MarketMemento>
Manages the Mesos card and building market. Holds the top and bottom card rows, the top building row, and the underlying deck. Notifies registered MarketObservers on every change (draws, refreshes, event resolutions).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Market(GameView gameView, BoardView boardView)
    Initializes the market by building the deck and buildings for the given player count, then populates both the bottom and top card/building rows.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addObserver(MarketObserver observerToAdd)
    Subscribes an observer to receive market change notifications.
    void
    buyBuildingBottomList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the bottom row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    buyBuildingTopList(int position, Player player)
    Purchases a building from the top row and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    buyExtraBuildingFromSnapshot(int position, Player player)
    Buys a building from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's buildings.
    void
    clearBottomCardList()
    Clears all cards from the bottom card row.
    MarketMemento
    createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current market state: top and bottom rows of cards and buildings, the remaining deck, and the pool of buildings not yet visible.
    void
    endOfRoundMarketActions()
    this method does all the things that has to be done at the end of the round in the market area: 1)if there are solves the events in the bottom list 2)clear the bottom list 3)shift the remaining card from the top list to the bottom list 4) refill the top list 5)Try refilling the topCardList 5.a) if an ERA change is detected it: 5.1) clears the bottomBuildingList 5.2)shift the building from the top to bottom building list 5.3) refill the topBuildingList 5.b) if the deck is finished throws DeckFineshed7
    List<BuildingCard>
    getBottomBuildingList()
    Returns the list of building cards available in the bottom (previous-round) building row.
    List<Card>
    getBottomCardList()
    Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the bottom (previous-round) row.
    List<BuildingCard>
    getTopBuildingList()
    Returns the list of building cards available in the top (current-round) building row.
    List<Card>
    getTopCardList()
    Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the top (current-round) row.
    void
    notifyMarketChanged()
    Notifies all subscribed observers of the current full market state.
    void
    removeObserver(MarketObserver observerToRemove)
    Unsubscribes an observer from market change notifications.
    void
    restoreMemento(MarketMemento memento)
    Restores the market state from the given memento, rebuilding all card and building lists via the DeckFactory.
    void
    selectCardFromBottomList(int position, Player player)
    Draws a card from the bottom row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    selectCardFromTopList(int position, Player player)
    Draws a card from the top row and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    selectExtraCardFromSnapshot(int position, Player player)
    Draws a tribe card from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's tribe.
    void
    snapshotForExtraDraw()
    Captures the current top card row and top building row into snapshot lists that will be used by the draw-one-more mechanic.
    void
    solveFinalEvents()
    Resolves the final events of the game.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Market

      public Market(GameView gameView, BoardView boardView)
      Initializes the market by building the deck and buildings for the given player count, then populates both the bottom and top card/building rows.
      Parameters:
      gameView - read-only view of the game, used to determine the player count.
      boardView - read-only view of the board, passed to the building factory.

  • Method Details

    • getBottomBuildingList

      public List<BuildingCard> getBottomBuildingList()
      Returns the list of building cards available in the bottom (previous-round) building row.
      Returns:
      bottom building list

    • getTopBuildingList

      public List<BuildingCard> getTopBuildingList()
      Returns the list of building cards available in the top (current-round) building row.
      Returns:
      top building list

    • getBottomCardList

      public List<Card> getBottomCardList()
      Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the bottom (previous-round) row.
      Returns:
      bottom card list

    • getTopCardList

      public List<Card> getTopCardList()
      Returns the list of cards (villagers and events) in the top (current-round) row.
      Returns:
      top card list

    • clearBottomCardList

      public void clearBottomCardList()
      Clears all cards from the bottom card row.

    • snapshotForExtraDraw

      public void snapshotForExtraDraw()
      Captures the current top card row and top building row into snapshot lists that will be used by the draw-one-more mechanic. Must be called before endOfRoundMarketActions() so the snapshot reflects the round that just ended, not the next one.

    • selectExtraCardFromSnapshot

      public void selectExtraCardFromSnapshot(int position, Player player) throws NotSelectableCardException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, EmptyMarketException
      Draws a tribe card from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the card to draw from the snapshot.
      player - the player who receives the card.
      Throws:
      NotSelectableCardException
      IndexOutOfBoundsException
      EmptyMarketException

    • buyExtraBuildingFromSnapshot

      public void buyExtraBuildingFromSnapshot(int position, Player player) throws NotEnoughFoodException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, EmptyMarketException
      Buys a building from the end-of-round snapshot (not the current top row) and adds it to the player's buildings.
      Parameters:
      position - zero-based index of the building to buy from the snapshot.
      player - the player who purchases the building.
      Throws:
      NotEnoughFoodException
      IndexOutOfBoundsException
      EmptyMarketException

    • endOfRoundMarketActions

      public void endOfRoundMarketActions() throws DeckFinishedException
      this method does all the things that has to be done at the end of the round in the market area: 1)if there are solves the events in the bottom list 2)clear the bottom list 3)shift the remaining card from the top list to the bottom list 4) refill the top list 5)Try refilling the topCardList 5.a) if an ERA change is detected it: 5.1) clears the bottomBuildingList 5.2)shift the building from the top to bottom building list 5.3) refill the topBuildingList 5.b) if the deck is finished throws DeckFineshed7
      Throws:
      DeckFinishedException - int the case the deck is finished it notifies the caller

    • selectCardFromTopList

      public void selectCardFromTopList(int position, Player player) throws NotSelectableCardException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, EmptyMarketException
      Draws a card from the top row and adds it to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the card to draw.
      player - the player drawing the card.
      Throws:
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card at the given position is an event card.
      EmptyMarketException - if the top row contains no selectable cards.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range.

    • buyBuildingTopList

      public void buyBuildingTopList(int position, Player player) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, NotEnoughFoodException, EmptyMarketException
      Purchases a building from the top row and adds it to the player's buildings.
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the building to buy.
      player - the player buying the building.
      Throws:
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the building.
      EmptyMarketException - if the top building row is empty.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range.

    • selectCardFromBottomList

      public void selectCardFromBottomList(int position, Player player) throws NotSelectableCardException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, EmptyMarketException
      Draws a card from the bottom row and adds it to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the card to draw.
      player - the player drawing the card.
      Throws:
      NotSelectableCardException - if the card at the given position is an event card.
      EmptyMarketException - if the bottom row contains no selectable cards.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range.

    • buyBuildingBottomList

      public void buyBuildingBottomList(int position, Player player) throws NotEnoughFoodException, IndexOutOfBoundsException, EmptyMarketException
      Purchases a building from the bottom row and adds it to the player's buildings.
      Parameters:
      position - the index of the building to buy.
      player - the player buying the building.
      Throws:
      NotEnoughFoodException - if the player cannot afford the building.
      EmptyMarketException - if the bottom building row is empty.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if position is out of range.

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(MarketObserver observerToAdd)
      Subscribes an observer to receive market change notifications.
      Parameters:
      observerToAdd - the observer to subscribe.

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(MarketObserver observerToRemove)
      Unsubscribes an observer from market change notifications.
      Parameters:
      observerToRemove - the observer to remove.

    • notifyMarketChanged

      public void notifyMarketChanged()
      Notifies all subscribed observers of the current full market state.

    • solveFinalEvents

      public void solveFinalEvents()
      Resolves the final events of the game. This method safely moves all Event cards from the top row to the bottom row using batch operations to prevent ConcurrentModificationExceptions, and then triggers their resolution.

    • createMemento

      public MarketMemento createMemento()
      Creates a memento capturing the current market state: top and bottom rows of cards and buildings, the remaining deck, and the pool of buildings not yet visible.
      Specified by:
      createMemento in interface MementoManager<MarketMemento>
      Returns:
      a MarketMemento containing snapshots of the market lists.

    • restoreMemento

      public void restoreMemento(MarketMemento memento)
      Restores the market state from the given memento, rebuilding all card and building lists via the DeckFactory.
      Specified by:
      restoreMemento in interface MementoManager<MarketMemento>
      Parameters:
      memento - the MarketMemento from which to restore the market state.
